comment: I like to save a lot of pins everyday. Pressing the save button & adding them to their type of pin board is inconvenient, especially when I have to save a lot of them. I suggest having the 'type of pins' to be added in display rather than the 'save' button coz that makes the job much easier(e. g- wallpapers, funny, celebrity) Also instead of seeing the 'saved' notification, just shadow the pin symbol if saved. Pls just show us a notif if we save the same pin again. Thanks, love pinterest鉂わ笍
the function of activity: Activity involves searching, accessing menus, filtering, viewing various content categories, managing pins, profiles, settings, creating, sharing, and navigating within the interface.
the sub-task list of state: [{'name': 'Save Pin', 'description': 'Save a pin or item to a board for later reference.'}]
